critic_notes: All seven questions are factually correct and well-supported by the source text. Quotes are verbatim substrings of the normalized source. However, several questions (4.9-001 through 4.9-004) cite page_start 47, which falls outside the manifest-declared range for section 4.9 (pages 48-49). The cited text genuinely appears on page 47 of the document; the manifest page range appears to be shifted by one page. No schema violations. Topic 'methodik' is appropriate throughout.

issues.detail: page_start is 47 but manifest declares section 4.9 range as pages 48-49. The cited text genuinely appears on page 47; the manifest page range appears shifted.
